expertises.name: HardLine - General consumer goods and accessories

actions.instructions:
Please include all the SKU names in the caption of all the pictures in the report if there are multiple SKUs in the booking.

Please add/take those pictures inside the generic picture section (3 dots menu (top right corner) > Camera): Factory Front Gate / Inspector in front of factory / Warehouse / Finished and Packed products / Finished but not packed / Semi-finished products / Total carton selected / Total pieces selected / All defectives pieces / Factory disclaimer / COC / (Draft Report - Optional)

zh.instructions:
如果订单中有多个SKU，请在报告中所有图片的标题中包含所有SKU名称。
请将这些图片添加到通用图片部分（3个点菜单（右上角）> 相机）：工厂正门 / 工厂前的检查员 / 仓库 / 完成并包装的产品 / 完成但未包装 / 半成品 / 总抽箱数量 / 总抽样数量 / 所有缺陷件 / 工厂免责声明 / COC / （草稿报告 - 可选）

elements.instruction:
Please input the total quantity finished and packed in pcs and %, the total quantity finished and unpacked in pcs and %.
If products are not ready for inspection:
      - Check the available product and semi-finished product and ask the factory to provide the packing material if available. 
      - Marked inspection as FAILED.
elements.expectedResult:
Quantity Ready and Packed should be matching the service type (100% / 80% for PSI - 20 % / 20% for DUPRO - 5% / 5% for IPC - ...)
Pls follow the below template on your comment.
XXXXPcs(XX%) Finished&Packed
XXXXPcs(XX%) Finished&Unpacked

已准备和包装的数量应与服务类型相匹配（100% / 80% 对于 PSI - 20% / 20% 对于 DUPRO - 5% / 5% 对于 IPC - ...）
请按照以下模板填写您的评论。
XXXXPcs(XX%) 完成&包装
XXXXPcs(XX%) 完成&未包装
zh.instruction:
请填写已完成和包装的总数量（以pcs和%表示），已完成和未包装的总数量（以pcs和%表示）。
如果产品尚未准备好进行检查：
- 检查可用产品和半成品，并询问工厂是否可以提供包装材料（如有）。
- 标记检查为不通过。

elements.name: Available Quantity Check: Finished&Packed&Unpacked

elements.instruction:
Please fill in the quantity details for item/reference/sku available on-site.
Please add inspected quantity and inspected number of cartons.

zh.name: 可用数量详情
zh.instruction:
请填写现场可用的项目/参考/SKU的数量详情。
请添加检查数量和检查的纸箱数量。

elements.name: Available Quantity Details

elements.instruction:
Were you able to select the cartons / sampling size fully randomly ? 
If yes, the result is passed, If not, the result is failed.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Take a picture of the stacks of cartons before selection​
2. Choose cartons from every pallet/stack.​
3. Choose cartons from different parts of the stack (top, bottom, left, right, front, back, middle, inside), including not accessible cartons ​
4. Ask factory for support in moving the goods if they are not accessible​
5. Take a picture of the stack after the selecting the cartons, showing how the random selection was done. ​
6. Take a picture of all selected cartons​
7. Follow the cartons from the warehouse to the inspection area, make sure they are not tempered with.  ​
8. Add a remark in the report and inform back-office if you cannot proceed with the random carton selection, explaining the reason.

zh.name: 随机抽箱
zh.expectedResult:
1. 在选择之前拍摄纸箱堆的照片​
2. 从每个托盘/堆中选择纸箱。​
3. 从堆的不同部分选择纸箱（顶部、底部、左侧、右侧、前面、后面、中间、内部），包括无法触及的纸箱​
4. 如果无法触及，请询问工厂协助移动货物​
5. 在选择纸箱后拍摄堆的照片，展示随机选择的过程。​
6. 拍摄所有选定纸箱的照片​
7. 从仓库跟踪纸箱到检查区域，确保没有掉包。​
8. 如果无法进行随机抽箱，请在报告中添加备注并通知办公室，说明原因。
zh.instruction:
您是否能够完全随机选择纸箱/抽样数量？
如果是，结果为合格；如果不是，结果为不合格。

elements.name: Inner Packing & Unit Packing

elements.instruction: Verify if the information of the product (PO number/item number/product description) packed inside the packing matches the information on the corresponding packing (gift box/export carton) or not if applicable

zh.name: 匹配包装信息
zh.instruction: 验证包装内的产品信息（采购订单号/项目编号/产品描述）是否与相应包装（礼品盒/出口纸箱）上的信息匹配（如适用）

elements.name: Match packing info

elements.instruction: Perform a carton drop test on the export cartons. (Follow the client's specification, carried out on 3 cartons according to ISTA 1A procedure if no specified).
elements.expectedResult: Let the carton fall freely on each of its faces, 3 edges and 1 corner from the specified height (if not specified use: <10kg: 76cm; 10-19kg: 61cm; 19-28kg: 46cm; 28-45kg: 31cm; 45-68kg: 20cm).

zh.name: 摔箱测试
zh.expectedResult: 让纸箱自由落下，落在每个面、3个边和1个角，从指定高度（如果未指定，使用：<10kg: 76cm; 10-19kg: 61cm; 19-28kg: 46cm; 28-45kg: 31cm; 45-68kg: 20cm）。
zh.instruction: 对出口纸箱进行摔箱测试。（遵循客户的规格，按照ISTA 1A程序在3个纸箱上进行，如果没有特别说明）。

elements.name: Carton drop test

elements.instruction:
Shake test - Only for products with blister package and shake by hand for the product before opening the blister.

To see: 1/If the products are coming out of the package or become misaligned. 
2/to confirm if the products are securely fastened

zh.name: 摇动测试信息
zh.instruction:
摇动测试 - 仅适用于带有吸塑包装的产品，并在打开吸塑之前手动摇动产品。
检查：1/产品是否从包装中出来或变得错位。
2/ 确认产品是否安全固定

elements.name: Shake test info

elements.instruction: Check that the colors are conform to the specifications from the client, and record the corresponding pantone code and / or deviation from the expected result.
elements.expectedResult:
1. If there is product pantone code on client’s specification, please do the product pantone code check. Compare the Pantone with the color box to ensure they match and photograph the comparison.
2. Check the color shade for all the inspected items (All colors that client selected for inspection).
3. Must compare the Pantone with the insert/color box pantone card, to check if they match.
Product shall be in the correct shade / color inside of the allowable 4-5 color shading range if no specification provided.

zh.name: 产品颜色
zh.expectedResult:
1. 如果客户的规格中有产品潘通色号，请进行产品潘通色号检查。将潘通与颜色盒进行比较，以确保它们匹配并拍摄比较照片。
2. 检查所有检查项目的颜色色差（所有客户选择进行检查的颜色）。
3. 必须将潘通与插入物/颜色盒的潘通卡进行比较，以检查它们是否匹配。
产品应在允许的4-5色差范围内，颜色/色调正确，如果没有提供规格。
zh.instruction: 检查颜色是否符合客户的规格，并记录相应的潘通色号和/或与预期结果的偏差。

elements.name: Product Colors

elements.instruction:
Check the logo according to the product specification:
1. Quality and design
2. Spelling
3. Font
4. Color
5. Dimension, positioning and alignment
elements.expectedResult: The logo should be of good quality, correct, complete, legible and not damaged compared to the specifications or the approval sample

comment.message: 不适用，产品上没有独立的logo

en.message: Not applicable; there is no independent logo on the product.

zh.name: 产品商标
zh.expectedResult: 与规格或批准样品相比，商标应质量良好、正确、完整、清晰且未损坏
zh.instruction:
根据产品规格检查商标：
1. 质量和设计
2. 拼写
3. 字体
4. 颜色
5. 尺寸、位置和对齐

elements.name: Product Logo

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the specified labels are found attached to the product.
2. Check that the information of the label is correct to specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
1. All specified labels shall be present and attached correctly to the product.
2. The information on the labels shall be correct to specifications.
3. It should not have been modified by hand or with extra sticker.

en.message: Not applicable; there is no label on the product.

zh.name: 产品标签
zh.expectedResult:
1. 所有指定标签应正确附着在产品上。
2. 标签上的信息应符合规格。
3. 不应手动或贴上额外的贴纸进行修改。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查指定标签是否附着在产品上。
2. 检查标签上的信息是否符合规格。

elements.name: Product Labels

elements.instruction: Check the dimensions, shape, style or color of the product against the approval sample if it's on-site and take for pictures.
elements.expectedResult: The products should be matched with the approval sample, a detailed caption is needed on approval sample and the bulk products.

comment.message: 工厂提供的样品只有盖子上有客人的签字贴纸。

en.message: The sample provided by the factory only has the client's signature sticker on the lid.

zh.name: 批准样品比较
zh.expectedResult: 产品应与批准样品相匹配，批准样品和大货产品需要详细说明。
zh.instruction: 检查产品的尺寸、形状、风格或颜色是否与现场的批准样品一致，并拍照。

elements.name: Approval Sample Comparison

elements.instruction: Compare actual dimensions vs customer's specifications & technical drawings. If no tolerances are provided by the customer, please follow +/- 5% tolerances as per QIMA Standards.

zh.name: 产品尺寸结果
zh.instruction: 比较实际尺寸与客户的规格和技术图纸。如果客户未提供公差，请遵循QIMA标准的±5%公差。

elements.name: Product Dimensions Result

elements.instruction: Input the product's dimensions according to the sample size required. If no sample size or required dimensions, follow QIMA'S Standard and measure length, width & height on 5 pcs per item.

zh.name: 产品尺寸详情
zh.instruction: 根据所需的抽样数量输入产品的尺寸。如果没有样本数量或所需尺寸，请遵循QIMA标准，并对每个项目测量5个pcs的长度、宽度和高度。

elements.name: Product Dimensions Details

elements.instruction: Compare actual weight vs customer specifications & technical drawings. If no tolerances are provided by the customer, please follow +/- 5% tolerances as per QIMA Standards.

zh.name: 产品重量结果
zh.instruction: 比较实际重量与客户的规格和技术图纸。如果客户未提供公差，请遵循QIMA标准的±5%公差。

elements.name: Product Weights Result

elements.instruction: Input the product's weight according to the sample size required. If no sample size or required dimensions, follow QIMA'S Standards and record the weight on 5 pcs per item.

zh.name: 产品重量详情
zh.instruction: 根据所需的抽样数量输入产品的重量。如果没有样本数量或所需尺寸，请遵循QIMA标准，并记录每个项目的5个pcs的重量。

elements.name: Product Weights Details

zh.name: QIMA - 产品尺寸与重量 - HL

testsChecklist.name: Q2612918144_1 - Test - Electronic or Mechanical toy (Not Plush toy)

elements.instruction:
1.Take measurements of the pins of the plug (diameter or width / height, and length). 
2.Take pictures of the measured points and clear measurement readings.
elements.expectedResult: The measurements should be within the tolerances according to the plug standard – refer to your table.

comment.message: 不适用，产品不包含插头

en.message: Not applicable; the product does not include a plug.

zh.name: 插头测试
zh.expectedResult: 测量值应在插头标准的公差范围内 - 请参阅您的表格。
zh.instruction:
1. 测量插头的引脚（直径或宽度/高度和长度）。
2. 拍摄测量点和清晰的测量读数的照片。

elements.name: Plug test

elements.instruction:
1. Assemble the items according to the instruction manual or specifications.
2. Check all accessories.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The product can be assembled or disassembled.

2.The product or parts shall fit without having to be forced together.

3. No gap or within tolerances, good alignment between parts.

zh.name: 装配测试
zh.expectedResult:
1. 产品可以组装或拆卸。
2. 产品或部件应无须强行结合。
3. 部件之间无间隙或在公差范围内，良好的对齐。
zh.instruction:
1. 根据说明手册或规格组装物品。
2. 检查所有配件。

elements.name: Assembly test

elements.instruction: Check the dimension of the safety space.
elements.expectedResult: The acceptable safety gap space should be smaller than 1/4 inch or bigger than 1/2 inch.

zh.name: 手指夹入测试
zh.expectedResult: 可接受的安全间隙应小于1/4英寸或大于1/2英寸。
zh.instruction: 检查安全间隙的尺寸。

elements.name: Finger entrapment test

elements.instruction:
1.For dimension of accessory 3mm-6mm,use clamp or hook to fix the accessory, slowly apply 50 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. then second apply the force with the direction of perpendicular to the 1st direction. slowly apply 50 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. if no pull gauge available onsite factory. We can use 5 kg mass to replace the pull gauge
2. For dimension of accessory more than 6mm,use clamp or hook to fix the accessory, slowly apply 70 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. then second apply the force with the direction of perpendicular to the 1st direction. slowly apply 70 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. if no pull gauge available onsite factory. We can use 7 kg mass to replace the pull gauge
3. For garment seams or footwear bonding strength of upper and sole. use clamp to fix the test part. slowly apply 100 N and maintain this force for 10 seconds. if no pull gauge available onsite factory. We can use 10 kg mass to replace the pull gauge
elements.expectedResult: No deformation, detachment, breakage in testing or after test for accessory or garment seams and footwear bonding strength of upper and sole.

zh.name: 拉力测试
zh.expectedResult: 在测试或测试后，配件或服装缝合和鞋面与鞋底的粘合强度无变形、脱落、断裂。
zh.instruction:
1. 对于尺寸为3mm-6mm的配件，使用夹具或钩子固定配件，缓慢施加50 N并保持该力10秒。然后第二次施加力的方向与第一次方向垂直。缓慢施加50 N并保持该力10秒。如果现场工厂没有拉力计，我们可以使用5 kg的质量替代拉力计。
2. 对于尺寸超过6mm的配件，使用夹具或钩子固定配件，缓慢施加70 N并保持该力10秒。然后第二次施加力的方向与第一次方向垂直。缓慢施加70 N并保持该力10秒。如果现场工厂没有拉力计，我们可以使用7 kg的质量替代拉力计。
3. 对于服装缝合或鞋面与鞋底的粘合强度，使用夹具固定测试部件。缓慢施加100 N并保持该力10秒。如果现场工厂没有拉力计，我们可以使用10 kg的质量替代拉力计。

elements.name: Pull test

elements.instruction: Repeatedly use the product and its adjustable parts to the full extent of their capacity for 20 cycles with the force by hand, or following the client specifications if there is any.
elements.expectedResult: The product or part shall not break, deform or be damaged in anyway after use; it should still function normally, without any loss.

zh.name: 疲劳测试
zh.expectedResult: 产品或部件在使用后不应断裂、变形或以任何方式损坏；应仍能正常工作，无任何损失。
zh.instruction: 重复使用产品及其可调部件，充分发挥其能力进行20个周期的手动施力，或按照客户的规格进行。

elements.name: Fatigue test

elements.instruction: Record the battery charging and discharging times per factory equipment set up.
elements.expectedResult: The results should match the specifications stated on the instruction manual or/and battery data sheet.

comment.message: 不适用，产品不包含电池

en.message: Not applicable; the product does not include a battery.

zh.name: 电池容量检查
zh.expectedResult: 结果应符合说明手册或/和电池数据表中所述的规格。
zh.instruction: 记录电池充电和放电的次数，按照工厂设备的设置进行。

elements.name: Battery capacity check

elements.instruction:
1. Perform a polarity check and battery fitness check with batteries of the indicated size.
2. Voltage check: record the output voltage using a multimeter
3. Record and take a picture of the battery production date (or expiration date);
4. Check if a plastic strip to prevent the battery from discharging is present or not.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The battery should be new and full.
2. The battery should not be out of date. 
3. If required by the client, the plastic strip should be present and well set.

en.message: Not applicable; the product does not come with a battery.

zh.name: 电池检查
zh.expectedResult:
1. 电池应为新电池且充满电。
2. 电池不得过期。
3. 如果客户要求，塑料条应存在且设置良好。
zh.instruction:
1. 使用指示尺寸的电池进行极性检查和电池适合性检查。
2. 电压检查：使用万用表记录输出电压。
3. 记录并拍摄电池生产日期（或过期日期）的照片；
4. 检查是否存在防止电池放电的塑料条。

elements.name: Battery check

elements.instruction:
1. Set the hi-pot tester to the specifications, depending on the product class , rating of product and specification. 
2. Ensure that the product under test is switched “ON”.
3. Connect the hi-pot tester to the product: 
Ground output on the product enclosure and high voltage output connected with test-probe, Touch the test-probe against appropriate testing  point, e.g. L & N plug contacts for Class I product ; 
Ground output on the product L & N plug contacts and high voltage output connected with test-probe, Touch the test-probe against appropriate test point, e.g. enclosure ,earth of sockets (like RCA contacts), battery contacts, antenna, housing, knobs, switches, screws, etc. for class II product.
4. The inspector performs the Hi-Pot test should stand insulation pad. 
5. The factory should arrange a factory QC to control the main power switch, so that the factory QC can Turn Off the main power when urgent situation happened.
6. Start the test and record the results."
elements.expectedResult:
The test is passed if the appliance can withstand the high voltage.
The test is failed if the appliance breaks down.

zh.name: 高压测试
zh.expectedResult:
如果设备能够承受高电压，则测试通过。
如果设备出现故障，则测试不通过。
zh.instruction:
1. 根据产品类别、产品额定值和规格设置高压测试仪。
2. 确保待测产品处于“开启”状态。
3. 将高压测试仪连接到产品：
产品外壳上的接地输出和高压输出连接测试探头，触摸测试探头到适当的测试点，例如针对I类产品的L和N插头接触点；
产品L和N插头接触点上的接地输出和高压输出连接测试探头，触摸测试探头到适当的测试点，例如外壳、插座的接地（如RCA接触点）、电池接触点、天线、外壳、旋钮、开关、螺钉等，针对II类产品。
4. 执行高压测试的验货员应站在绝缘垫上。
5. 工厂应安排工厂QC控制主电源开关，以便工厂QC在紧急情况下可以关闭主电源。
6. 开始测试并记录结果。

elements.name: Hi-pot test

elements.instruction: Check if there is condensation on the packaging and product.
elements.expectedResult: The product and packaging should be dry.

zh.name: 冷凝检查
zh.expectedResult: 产品和包装应干燥。
zh.instruction: 检查包装和产品上是否有冷凝现象。

elements.name: Condensation check

elements.expectedResult:
There should be a marking inside the battery compartment indication the polarity and any required warning; the batteries should fit in the compartment and the product should function.
The battery cover opening/closing method should comply with the specifications; unless otherwise specified, covers for products meant for users age 3 and below should require a tool to open.

zh.name: 电池舱检查
zh.expectedResult:
电池舱内应有标记指示极性和任何必要的警告；电池应适合电池舱，产品应能正常工作。
电池盖的开启/关闭方法应符合规格；除非另有说明，针对3岁及以下用户的产品，其盖子应需要工具才能打开。
zh.instruction:
1. 打开电池舱；
2. 验证标记（标签或模压在舱内）；
3. 根据标记插入电池并测试产品功能；
4. 电池盖：盖子应适合，保持安全关闭并有效保护电池。

elements.name: Battery compartment check

elements.instruction:
1. Operate the product at the claimed maximal range, and observe the behaviour of the product.
2. If no maximal range is given, operate the product at increasing distance at least 10 meters and record the distance at which the remote control is not working.
elements.expectedResult: The product should function flawlessly at the maximum claimed range: no malfunction, limited reaction, etc.

zh.name: 操作范围（遥控产品）
zh.expectedResult: 产品应在最大声称范围内无故障运行：无故障、反应有限等。
zh.instruction:
1. 在声称的最大范围内操作产品，并观察产品的行为。
2. 如果没有给出最大范围，则在至少10米的距离内逐渐操作产品，并记录遥控器不工作的距离。

elements.name: Operation range (remotely operated products)

elements.expectedResult:
The artwork, logo, marking or the area tested are completed and clear after the test.
There should not be any peeled off after the tape is removed, nor any color transferred onto the tape.

zh.name: 粘合剂测试
zh.expectedResult:
测试后的艺术品、标志、标记或测试区域应完整且清晰。
移除胶带后不应有任何剥落，也不应有任何颜色转移到胶带上。
zh.instruction:
1. 确保测试前表面干净。
2. 使用一条压敏胶带（例如3M 500），将其牢固地应用于整个待测区域：艺术品、标志、标记或客户指定的区域；
3. 用手在表面上按压，使胶带牢固粘贴，无气泡或皱纹；
4. 以接近60度的角度快速但不急促地在0.5-1秒内移除胶带。
5. 在同一区域重复此操作3次，使用过的胶带应剪掉。

elements.name: Adhesive test

elements.instruction:
Check if the product (on the metallic parts) is magnetic with a magnet and record the outcome.  The procedures for the magnetic field test shall
be selected according to magnetic test requirements
elements.expectedResult:
The magnetic property of the item should be in line with the client requirements.
Please state the test result using one of the three options below and include a clear remark:
- "Magnetic" — the magnet sticks to the product.
- "Non-magnetic" — the magnet does not stick to the product.
- "N/A" — not applicable; include a mandatory remark (e.g., “no metallic parts on the product”).
Example: Magnetic — magnet sticks to the outer casing.

comment.message: 不适用，产品表面不包含金属。

en.message: Not applicable; the product surface does not contain metal.

zh.name: 磁性检查
zh.expectedResult:
项目的磁性应符合客户要求。
请使用以下三种选项之一陈述测试结果，并附上清晰的备注：
- “磁性” — 磁铁吸附在产品上。
- “非磁性” — 磁铁不吸附在产品上。
- “N/A” — 不适用；包含强制性备注（例如，“产品上没有金属部件”）。
示例：磁性 — 磁铁吸附在外壳上。
zh.instruction: 检查产品（在金属部件上）是否具有磁性，并记录结果。磁场测试的程序应根据磁性测试要求选择。

elements.name: Magnetic check

elements.instruction:
1. Test the function of the product to the full extent of its capacities.
2. If available apply the instructions given in the client specifications or product documentations.
3. If the product includes components or accessories, each one must be tested and must come from the bulk production.
elements.expectedResult:
Product should function as intended and meet all client requirements.
Report any discrepancy.

zh.name: 功能测试
zh.expectedResult:
产品应按预期功能运行，并满足所有客户要求。
报告任何差异。
zh.instruction:
1. 测试产品的功能，充分发挥其能力。
2. 如果可用，请应用客户规格或产品文档中提供的说明。
3. 如果产品包含组件或配件，每个都必须经过测试，并且必须来自大货生产。

elements.name: Function test

elements.instruction: Use the factory equipment (calibrated transmitter or receiver from a signal generator) to verify the frequency at which the product operates.
elements.expectedResult:
The product frequency readings should conform to the client's specifications.
If no specification is provided, result as N/A and record the actual frequency range readings for client's references only.

zh.name: 频段测试
zh.expectedResult:
产品频率读数应符合客户的规格。
如果没有提供规格，则结果为N/A，并记录实际频率范围读数，仅供客户参考。
zh.instruction: 使用工厂设备（来自信号发生器的校准发射机或接收机）验证产品操作的频率。

elements.name: Frequency band test

elements.instruction:
1. Use scanner or phone APP and scan barcode.
2. Scan any barcode on the product and compare the results to the code under the barcodes (if any) and to the specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Barcode must match the client's specifications.
2. It should be scannable and have the correct number.

zh.name: 条形码/二维码扫描测试
zh.expectedResult:
1. 条形码必须符合客户规格。
2. 应可扫描并具有正确的数字。
zh.instruction:
1. 使用扫描仪或手机应用程序扫描条形码。
2. 扫描产品上的任何条形码，并将结果与条形码下的代码（如有）和规格进行比较。

elements.name: Barcode/QR code scanning test

elements.instruction:
Check the logo:



1. Quality and design

2. Spelling

3. Font

4. Color

5. Dimension, positioning and alignment
elements.expectedResult: The logo should be of good quality, correct, complete, legible and not damaged compared to the specifications or the approval sample.

comment.message: 不适用，产品上没有独立的logo。

en.message: Not applicable; there is no independent logo on the product.

zh.name: 标志检查
zh.expectedResult: 与规格或批准样本相比，标志应质量良好、正确、完整、清晰且未损坏。
zh.instruction:
检查标志：
1. 质量和设计
2. 拼写
3. 字体
4. 颜色
5. 尺寸、定位和对齐

elements.name: Logo check

elements.expectedResult: The components should be held in place in the product and not loose; the cables should not be damaged and must be well soldered and secured.

comment.message: 现场没有提供CDF 比对。

en.message: No CDF comparison was provided on-site.

zh.name: 内部检查
zh.expectedResult: 组件应在产品中固定到位且不松动；电缆不得损坏，必须焊接良好并固定。
zh.instruction:
1. 打开产品；
2. 检查电缆状态和保护，电缆止动；
3. 检查产品设计的内部可靠性，验证组件是否牢固固定，并寻找任何松动的部件；
4. 检查电缆焊接的质量：使用正常的力量拉动内部电缆以验证其是否固定良好。
拍摄展示整个内部结构及发现的任何值得注意的细节和问题的照片。

elements.name: Internal check

zh.name: Q2612918144_1 - 测试 - 电子或机械玩具（非毛绒玩具）

defectsChecklist.name: Q2612918144_1 - Defect - Electronic or Mechanical toy (Not Plush toy)

defects.name: Scratch / scarring /Gouge mark - Scratch/scarring
defects.description: Scratch/scarring on primary visible surface > 10 mm length or any deep mark that can be felt by fingernail / breaks coating.

zh.name: 划痕/伤痕/凹痕 - 划痕/伤痕
zh.description: 主要可见表面上有长度超过10mm的划痕/伤痕或任何用指甲能感觉到的深刻痕迹/破坏涂层。

defects.name: Scratch / scarring /Gouge mark - Light
defects.description: Light scratch/scarring not felt and only visible close-up and only visible less than 30cm away.

zh.name: 划痕/伤痕/凹痕 - 轻微
zh.description: 轻微的划痕/伤痕不易感觉，只有在近距离可见，且距离小于30cm时可见。

defects.name: Impurity, Spot, Dust, Stain, Dirt - bigger than 1cm
defects.description:
The product contains serious dirt mark/impurty etc visible more than 30cm away.
The dirt mark/impurity is bigger than 1cm. There are more than 3 dirt marks / impurities in 1 cm square

zh.name: 杂质、斑点、灰尘、污垢 - 大于1cm
zh.description:
产品上有严重的污垢痕迹/杂质等，距离超过30cm可见。
污垢痕迹/杂质大于1cm。在1cm平方内有超过3个污垢痕迹/杂质。

defects.name: Impurity, Spot, Dust, Stain, Dirt - less than 1cm
defects.description:
The product contains dirt mark/impurty etc only visible less than 30cm away.
The dirt mark/impurity is less than 1cm. There are less than 3 dirt marks / impurities in 1 cm square

zh.name: 杂质、斑点、灰尘、污垢 - 小于1cm
zh.description:
产品上有污垢痕迹/杂质等，只在距离小于30cm时可见。
污垢痕迹/杂质小于1cm。在1cm平方内有少于3个污垢痕迹/杂质。

en.message:
Impurity - Min - 6 Pcs
Dirt mark - Min - 2 Pcs

defects.name: Poor assembly / Poor construction / Weak / Gaps
defects.description: The product or parts (assembly) is not fitting well together or has to be forced together. There are gaps in between parts where there shouldn't be. The product is prone to breakage

zh.name: 装配不良/构造不良/弱/间隙
zh.description: 产品或部件（装配）未能良好契合或必须强行结合。部件之间存在不应有的间隙。产品易碎。

defects.name: Flash / burr - visible at less than 30cm away
defects.description: The product is not well finished and presents flash or burrs visible only at less than 30cm.

zh.name: 飞边/毛刺 - 在距离小于30cm时可见
zh.description: 产品未经过良好处理，存在在距离小于30cm时可见的飞边或毛刺。

defects.name: Flash / burr - visible more than 30cm away
defects.description: The product is not well finished and presents flash or burrs visible at more than 30cm.

zh.name: 飞边/毛刺 - 在距离超过30cm时可见
zh.description: 产品未经过良好处理，存在在距离超过30cm时可见的飞边或毛刺。

defects.name: Marking / Printing / Artwork: Damaged
defects.description: The required information is deformed, damaged, or otherwise not readable/acceptable (e.g., smudged, blurred, distorted, partial print, broken artwork).

zh.name: 标记/印刷/艺术品：损坏
zh.description: 所需信息变形、损坏或以其他方式无法读取/接受（例如，模糊、失真、部分印刷、艺术品损坏）。

defects.name: Poor finish - visible more than 30cm away
defects.description: The product has a poor finishing defect visible from 30cm away

zh.name: 表面处理不良 - 在距离超过30cm时可见
zh.description: 产品存在从30cm远处可见的表面处理缺陷。

defects.name: Poor finish - visible at less than 30cm away
defects.description: The product has a poor finishing defect only visible less than 30cm away.

zh.name: 表面处理不良 - 在距离小于30cm时可见
zh.description: 产品存在仅在距离小于30cm时可见的表面处理缺陷。

defects.name: Untrimmed threads - >1 cm
defects.description: more than 1 cm

zh.name: 未修剪的线头 - >1 cm
zh.description: 超过1 cm

defects.name: Untrimmed threads - <1 cm
defects.description: less than 1 cm

zh.name: 未修剪的线头 - <1 cm
zh.description: 少于1 cm

defects.name: Glue marks - Hidden
defects.description: Glue residue only on hidden area, only visible close-up (from less than 30cm), does not affect function.

zh.name: 胶水痕迹 - 隐藏
zh.description: 胶水残留仅在隐藏区域，仅在近距离（小于30cm）可见，不影响功能。

defects.name: Glue marks - Visible
defects.description: Glue visible on primary visible surfaces at normal viewing distance (~30cm) OR glue causes poor finishing (strings/lumps) or interferes with function/assembly.

zh.name: 胶水痕迹 - 可见
zh.description: 胶水在正常观察距离（约30cm）下可见于主要可见表面，或胶水导致表面处理不良（丝状物/块状物）或干扰功能/装配。

defects.name: Glazing defect
defects.description: Glazing is missing, coming off, poor, uneven or blisters on the surface of the item.

zh.name: 釉面缺陷
zh.description: 釉面缺失、脱落、劣质、不均匀或表面起泡。

defects.name: Rough surface - Visible
defects.description: The product contains rough surface areas visible from 30cm away. The rough surface can be flaking, unsmoothed / un-sanded, irregular or unfinished / non-fully treated. The defect can be felt by touch and the area has more than 2 cm diameter or is located in an obvious position.

zh.name: 粗糙表面 - 可见
zh.description: 产品存在从30cm远处可见的粗糙表面区域。粗糙表面可能是剥落、未打磨/未砂光、不规则或未完成/未充分处理。缺陷可通过触摸感觉到，且区域直径超过2cm或位于明显位置。

defects.name: Rough surface - Limited
defects.description: The product's contains limited rough surface areas only visible less than 30cm away. The rough surface can be flaking, unsmoothed / un-sanded, irregular or unfinished / non-fully treated. The defect can be felt by touch and is limited by size or is located in a non-obvious position.

zh.name: 粗糙表面 - 有限
zh.description: 产品仅在距离小于30cm时可见的有限粗糙表面区域。粗糙表面可能是剥落、未打磨/未砂光、不规则或未完成/未充分处理。缺陷可通过触摸感觉到，且大小有限或位于不明显位置。

defects.name: Label / Hangtag : Poorly attached or Missing
defects.description: The label is loose or not securely attached. Misplaced / incorrect placement or tilted label.

zh.name: 标签/吊牌：附着不良或缺失
zh.description: 标签松动或未牢固附着。标签位置不当/不正确或倾斜。

defects.name: Functionality and usability
defects.description: The item, part, component, product does not function or not as expected.

zh.name: 功能性和可用性
zh.description: 物品、部件、组件、产品无法正常工作或未如预期。

defects.name: Functionality damaged or no function - Maj
defects.description: The item, part, component, product does not function or not as expected.

zh.name: 功能性损坏或无功能 - 重要
zh.description: 物品、部件、组件、产品无法正常工作或未如预期。

defects.name: Functionality damaged or no function - Cri
defects.description: The item, part, component, product does not function or not as expected.

zh.name: 功能性损坏或无功能 - 致命
zh.description: 物品、部件、组件、产品无法正常工作或未如预期。

defects.name: Dent / Chip - dent / chip in an obvious position
defects.description: The product contains a dent / chip in an obvious position and can be clearly seen from more than 30cm away

zh.name: 凹痕/缺口 - 在明显位置的凹痕/缺口
zh.description: 产品在明显位置存在凹痕/缺口，并且在距离超过30cm时可清晰看到。

defects.name: Dent / Chip - dent / chip in an hidden position
defects.description: The product contains a dent / chip in an otherwise unobvious position (hidden) or only visible less than 30cm away.

zh.name: 凹痕/缺口 - 在隐藏位置的凹痕/缺口
zh.description: 产品在不明显位置（隐藏）存在凹痕/缺口，或仅在距离小于30cm时可见。

defects.name: Damaged / broken product or part
defects.description: The product or any of its parts is broken or damaged, unusable.

zh.name: 产品或部件损坏/破损
zh.description: 产品或任何部件损坏、破损，无法使用。

defects.name: Crease marks - more than 2 cm
defects.description: more than 2 cm

zh.name: 折痕 - 超过2 cm
zh.description: 超过2 cm

defects.name: Crease marks - less than 2 cm
defects.description: less than 2 cm

zh.name: 折痕 - 小于2 cm
zh.description: 小于2 cm

defects.name: Retail Packaging : Incorrect
defects.description: The packing used is incorrect (sealing method, type, etc)

zh.name: 零售包装：不正确
zh.description: 使用的包装不正确（密封方法、类型等）。

defects.name: Polybag: Incorrect / Absent vent holes
defects.description: Absence of vents holes or thickness <0.038mm on the polybag or on any plastic film larger than 10cm x 10cm

zh.name: 塑料袋：缺少/不正确的通风孔
zh.description: 塑料袋或任何大于10cm x 10cm的塑料薄膜缺少通风孔或厚度<0.038mm。

defects.name: Sharp point / edge
defects.description: The product contains any non-functional, non-specified sharp extremity that can potentially cause harm. This include any protruding nail, screw or staple.

zh.name: 锋利的尖端/边缘
zh.description: 产品存在任何非功能性、未指定的锋利尖端，可能造成伤害。这包括任何突出的钉子、螺丝或订书钉。

defects.name: Wrinkles / Puckering / Creases / Waves
defects.description: The product contains wrinkles or creases only visible less than 1m away.

defects.name: Skipped stitches - MAJ
defects.description: Skipped stitches - MAJ

defects.name: Chipped  (MAJ)
defects.description: The chip is larger than 1cm and visible from 1m away.

defects.name: Deformation / Different Shape
defects.description: The shape / form is different to the specification or approval samples visible from 1m away.

zh.name: Q2612918144_1 - 缺陷 - 电子或机械玩具（非毛绒玩具）

elements.instruction: Please confirm the factory location is the same as booked by the client.

zh.name: 工厂/车间位置是否与预订的一致？
zh.instruction: 请确认工厂位置是否与客户预订的一致。

elements.name: Is the factory/workshop location same as booked?

zh.name: 工厂合作、组织和清洁度

elements.instruction: Please confirm the lighting conditions in the inspection room.

zh.name: 检查室照明条件
zh.instruction: 请确认检查室的照明条件。

elements.name: Inspection Room Lighting Conditions

elements.instruction: Were the tools provided by the factory calibrated?

zh.name: 工具校准
zh.instruction: 工厂提供的工具是否经过校准？

elements.name: Tools calibration

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the cartons are on pallets (no contact with walls / floor, at least 0.5m away from window), dry (check the bottom of cartons) and without moisture or mold.
2. Check that the storing areas for cartons, products, fabrics and materials are clean, dry, with ventilation and without mold / water on walls.
3. Check that the storing area's humidity is to / below specifications, follow 70% if there is no specification.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The cartons shall be stored in correct conditions and free from any effect from moisture.
2. The storage areas shall clean, dry, ventilated and without the presence of mold / water. 
3. The humidity shall be to / below specifications.
High Risk- evidence shows the instruction is not followed or the proof on the mold issues found on site

zh.name: 防霉检查
zh.expectedResult:
1. 纸箱应存放在正确的条件下，免受潮湿影响。
2. 存储区域应清洁、干燥、通风，并且没有霉菌/水的存在。
3. 湿度应符合/低于规格。
高风险 - 证据表明未遵循说明或现场发现霉菌问题的证据。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查纸箱是否放在托盘上（不接触墙壁/地面，距离窗户至少0.5m），干燥（检查纸箱底部）且无潮湿或霉菌。
2. 检查纸箱、产品、面料和材料的存储区域是否干净、干燥、通风且无墙壁上的霉菌/水。
3. 检查存储区域的湿度是否符合/低于规格，如无规格则遵循70%。

elements.name: Mold Prevention Check

elements.instruction: Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report, and COC must be signed by inspectors and factory representatives. Pictures of the signed documents must be provided.

zh.name: QIMA文件是否已签署？
zh.instruction: 工厂免责声明、草稿报告和COC必须由验货员和工厂代表签署。必须提供已签署文件的照片。

elements.name: Are the QIMA documents signed?

zh.name: 工厂免责声明、草稿报告和COC

elements.name: Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report and COC

actions.text:
Issued by QIMA Inspection (Shenzhen) Limited
Reviewed by Joseph Wang

THE ABOVE RESULT(S) REFLECT(S) QIMA LIMITED’S FINDINGS AT THE TIME AND PLACE OF INSPECTION. THIS REPORT DOES NOT RELEASE THE BUYER OR SELLER FROM CONTRACTUAL RESPONSIBILITIES, NOR DOES IT PREJUDICE THE BUYER’S RIGHT OF CLAIM TOWARD THE SELLER/SUPPLIER FOR COMPENSATION FOR ANY APPARENT AND/OR HIDDEN DEFECTS NOT DETECTED DURING INSPECTION OR OCCURRING ANYTIME THEREAFTER.

globalRemark.message: 1. 工厂现场提供的样品只有盖子上面有客人的签字确认。

en.message: 1. The samples provided on-site by the factory only have the client's signature confirmation on the lid.

defectsFound.name: Impurity, Spot, Dust, Stain, Dirt - less than 1cm
defectsFound.description:
The product contains dirt mark/impurty etc only visible less than 30cm away.
The dirt mark/impurity is less than 1cm. There are less than 3 dirt marks / impurities in 1 cm square

zh.name: 杂质、斑点、灰尘、污垢 - 小于1cm
zh.description:
产品上有污垢痕迹/杂质等，只在距离小于30cm时可见。
污垢痕迹/杂质小于1cm。在1cm平方内有少于3个污垢痕迹/杂质。

en.message:
Impurity - Min - 6 Pcs
Dirt mark - Min - 2 Pcs

defectsFound.defectChecklistName: Q2612918144_1 - Defect - Electronic or Mechanical toy (Not Plush toy)

defectsFound.name: Poor assembly / Poor construction / Weak / Gaps
defectsFound.description: The product or parts (assembly) is not fitting well together or has to be forced together. There are gaps in between parts where there shouldn't be. The product is prone to breakage

zh.name: 装配不良/构造不良/弱/间隙
zh.description: 产品或部件（装配）未能良好契合或必须强行结合。部件之间存在不应有的间隙。产品易碎。
